name: open-meteo-test-realm
description: An Open-Meteo API-testing example with a small weather CLI.

scripts.test:mocked:report: mkdir -p reports coverage && jest test/mocked --runInBand --verbose --json --outputFile=reports/mocked-test-results.json --coverage --coverageDirectory=coverage --coverageReporters=json-summary --coverageReporters=lcov && npm run test:celebrate
scripts.test:live:report: mkdir -p reports && jest test/live --runInBand --verbose --json --outputFile=reports/live-test-results.json && npm run test:celebrate
scripts.test:all: jest test/mocked test/live --runInBand --verbose && npm run test:celebrate
